```{r}
ggsave("../Output/Participant_data/Lung_function_category_barplot.svg",
       p_counts, width = 8, height = 6)
```

# Recode gender and smoking status as factors 
```{r}
# Recoding gender
recode_gender <- function(x) {
  g <- tolower(as.character(x))
  g <- dplyr::case_when(g %in% c("m","male") ~ "male",
                        g %in% c("f","female") ~ "female",
                        TRUE ~ g)
  factor(g, levels = c("male","female"))
}

# Recoding smoking status
recode_smoking <- function(x) {
  s <- tolower(as.character(x))
  s <- dplyr::case_when(
    s %in% c("non","never","no") ~ "never",
    s %in% c("ex","former","previous","prev") ~ "former",
    s %in% c("current","smoker") ~ "current",
    TRUE ~ s
  )
  factor(s, levels = c("never","former","current"))
}

# Recode gender and smoking status inside a phyloseq object's sam_data
recode_gender_smoking_in_ps <- function(ps) {
  sd <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), "data.frame")

  if ("gender" %in% names(sd)) {
    sd$gender <- recode_gender(sd$gender)  # your function
  }
  if ("smoke_status" %in% names(sd)) {
    sd$smoke_status <- recode_smoking(sd$smoke_status)  # your function
  }

  phyloseq::sample_data(ps) <- sd
  ps
}

ps4 <- recode_gender_smoking_in_ps(ps4)
```

# Add season to phyloseq metadata
```{r}
add_season_to_master <- function(ps,
  vgo2_np_raw_rds = "../Input/Phyloseq/VGO2_NP/Received_Mari_Lee/ps_raw.Rds",
  vgo2_op_csv     = "../Input/Phyloseq/VGO2_OP/COPD_microbiome_subjectdata.csv") {

  # Pull sam_data as a plain data.frame
  sd <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(sd)) sd$sample_id <- rownames(sd)

  # Start clean target column
  sd$season_microbiome_sampling <- NA_character_

  # Helpers
  season_from_month <- function(m) {
    ifelse(m %in% c(3,4,5),  "Spring",
    ifelse(m %in% c(6,7,8),  "Summer",
    ifelse(m %in% c(9,10,11),"Autumn", "Winter")))
  }
  code_to_label <- function(z) {
    z <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(z)))
    c("Winter","Spring","Summer","Autumn")[match(z, 1:4)]
  }
  parse_any_date <- function(x) {
    x <- as.character(x)
    suppressWarnings(lubridate::parse_date_time(
      x, orders = c("Ymd","dmy","mdy","Y-m-d","d/m/Y","m/d/Y"), quiet = TRUE
    ))
  }

  # ===== 1) VGO3 (NP & OP): derive from date_spiro =====
  idx_vgo3 <- sd$dataset == "VGO3_NPOP"
  if (any(idx_vgo3)) {
    d <- parse_any_date(sd$date_spiro[idx_vgo3])
    mo <- as.integer(month(d))
    labs <- season_from_month(mo)
    fill_idx <- idx_vgo3 & !is.na(labs)
    sd$season_microbiome_sampling[fill_idx] <- labs[!is.na(labs)]
  }

  # ===== 2) VGO2 OP: merge season code from CSV (ID -> VGO3_ID) =====
  if (file.exists(vgo2_op_csv)) {
    lk_op <- read.csv(vgo2_op_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
      mutate(ID = trimws(as.character(ID)),
             season_code_op = season) %>%
      select(ID, season_code_op) %>%
      distinct(ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

    idx_op <- sd$dataset == "VGO2_OP"
    if (any(idx_op)) {
      sd$VGO3_ID_chr <- trimws(as.character(sd$VGO3_ID))
      # Left join only the OP rows, then map back
      op_sub <- sd[idx_op, , drop = FALSE] %>%
        left_join(lk_op, by = c("VGO3_ID_chr" = "ID"))
      labs <- code_to_label(op_sub$season_code_op)
      fill <- !is.na(labs)
      sd$season_microbiome_sampling[idx_op][fill] <- labs[fill]
      sd$VGO3_ID_chr <- NULL
    }
  } else {
    message("VGO2 OP season CSV not found: ", vgo2_op_csv)
  }

  # ===== 3) VGO2 NP: lookup from raw PS after T2/T3 drop + de-dup on respnr =====
  if (file.exists(vgo2_np_raw_rds)) {
    VGO2_NP_all <- readRDS(vgo2_np_raw_rds)
    VGO2_NP_t1 <- phyloseq::subset_samples(VGO2_NP_all, !stringr::str_detect(subject_identifier, "T2|T3"))

    meta_all <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(VGO2_NP_t1), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    meta_all$sample_id <- phyloseq::sample_names(VGO2_NP_t1)

    meta_NP    <- meta_all %>% filter(sample_type == "NP")
    meta_other <- meta_all %>% filter(sample_type != "NP")

    meta_NP_dedup <- meta_NP %>% filter(!is.na(respnr)) %>% distinct(respnr, .keep_all = TRUE)
    meta_NP_na    <- meta_NP %>% filter(is.na(respnr))
    keep_ids <- c(meta_NP_dedup$sample_id, meta_NP_na$sample_id, meta_other$sample_id)

    VGO2_NP_dedup <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep_ids, VGO2_NP_t1)
    np_sd <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(VGO2_NP_dedup), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    np_sd$sample_id <- rownames(np_sd)

    lk_np <- np_sd %>%
      transmute(sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
                season_code_np = season) %>%
      distinct(sample_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

    # Join the lookup into ALL rows, fill only VGO2_NP
    sd <- sd %>%
      left_join(lk_np, by = "sample_id")

    idx_np <- sd$dataset == "VGO2_NP" & !is.na(sd$season_code_np)
    sd$season_microbiome_sampling[idx_np] <- code_to_label(sd$season_code_np[idx_np])

    sd$season_code_np <- NULL
  } else {
    message("VGO2 NP raw phyloseq not found: ", vgo2_np_raw_rds)
  }

  # Finalise factor & write back
  sd$season_microbiome_sampling <- factor(sd$season_microbiome_sampling,
                                          levels = c("Winter","Spring","Summer","Autumn"),
                                          ordered = FALSE)

  rownames(sd) <- sd$sample_id
  phyloseq::sample_data(ps) <- sd
  ps
}


# Use it to add season to the phyloseq metadata
ps4 <- add_season_to_master(ps4)

# Check season has been added
ps4@sam_data$season_microbiome_sampling

# Check NAs in season variable
sum(is.na(ps4@sam_data$season_microbiome_sampling)) # 2 NAs - see where these are
df <- data.frame(ps4@sam_data)
print(table(df$dataset, df$season_microbiome_sampling, useNA = "ifany")) # Both NA season values are from the VGO2_NP dataset

# 1 = winter, 2 = spring, 3 = summer, 4 = autumn
```
# Save phyloseq
```{r}
saveRDS(ps4, "../Output/Phyloseq/ps4.rds")
```
